messages.content:
你是 story 聚类复核器。

输入是一组候选事件帧（含候选分组线索）。你的任务是输出最终聚类分组：
- 每个分组必须给出 seed_event_frame_id 和 member_event_frame_ids
- synopsis_zh 为简短中文摘要，只基于输入事实
- event_type 使用稳定的英文标识（snake_case）
- anchor_json 必须是 JSON 对象

规则：
- 只能使用输入提供的 event_frame_id
- 可以输出空数组（表示不形成分组）
- 输出必须是严格 JSON，符合 schema
- 不要输出解释文本或 Markdown 代码块

输出 JSON 结构：
{
  "groups": [
    {
      "seed_event_frame_id": "...",
      "member_event_frame_ids": ["..."],
      "synopsis_zh": "...",
      "event_type": "...",
      "anchor_json": {}
    }
  ]
}

{"candidate_frames": [{"event_frame_id": "9936bf30-b113-4395-8b5f-1f69aef437c6", "article_id": "fc4bec44-de03-423d-b834-246b97d6c405", "source_name": "Who What Wear", "source_lang": "en", "event_type": "designer_collection_reference", "brand": "Gucci", "person": "", "collection": "", "season": "", "place": "", "action_text": "", "object_text": "", "evidence_snippets": ["Demna's sophomore collection for Gucci, which imagined signatures from Tom Ford's tenure through an even sleazier, sexier lens"], "anchor_json": {"historical_reference": "Tom Ford era Gucci", "styling_direction": "sleazier, sexier", "brand": "Gucci"}}, {"event_frame_id": "e3c20d2f-69c7-4c0e-b7d6-090f75b8efd8", "article_id": "b26aa539-bb20-4186-9a9d-de8d085f8bb9", "source_name": "Coveteur", "source_lang": "en", "event_type": "red_carpet_appearance", "brand": "Gucci", "person": "Demi Moore", "collection": "", "season": "", "place": "", "action_text": "", "object_text": "", "evidence_snippets": ["Moore has been collaborating with Demna at Gucci since his first collection, so it made sense that she would opt for a custom Gucci look for the Oscars ceremony tonight, in a dramatic green feather strapless gown"], "anchor_json": {"person": "Demi Moore", "brand": "Gucci", "designer": "Demna", "key_detail": "green feather strapless gown"}}]}
